message:
chore(beads): Enhance bd-19y9 E2E tests and auto-fix test framework

- bd-19y9.1.8: Added 4 edge case E2E tests (container timeout,
  OOM scenario, disk exhaustion, network partition) expanding
  test coverage from 12 to 16 tests

- bd-19y9.3.6: Added TAP output format for CI integration and
  parallel test execution support with configurable workers.
  New unit tests for checksum verification, backup permissions,
  and atomic write resilience

- bd-19y9.3.7: Added JSON output format (--format json) for
  automation/CI integration, consistent with acfs-checker patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
